name: Medline Shower Chair with Padded Arms & Back
shortDescription: The most-reviewed shower chair we recommend — padded arms and back, rock-solid, and easy to adjust.

name: Medline Compact Shower Chair
shortDescription: A space-saving version of Medline's top chair, with the same padded arms and back.
notIdealFor: larger users wanting a wide seat

name: Drive Medical Shower Chair (Removable Arms & Back)
shortDescription: A versatile shower chair whose arms and back come off tool-free as needs change.

name: Drive Medical Shower Chair with Suction Feet
shortDescription: Suction-cup feet grip wet floors for extra security, with push-button height adjustment.

name: HOMLAND Heavy-Duty Shower Chair (500 lb)
shortDescription: A 500 lb aluminum-alloy chair with wide skid-resistant feet and removable arms and back.

name: VFAUOSIT Shower Chair (550 lb, 4-in-1)
shortDescription: Our highest-capacity pick at 550 lb, with a reinforced crossbar and configurable design.

name: KingPavonini Heavy-Duty Shower Chair (550 lb)
shortDescription: A 550 lb chair with M-shaped anti-slip padded handles and a reinforced crossing bar.

name: DecoTeak Teak Wood Shower Bench
shortDescription: Solid teak that never rusts or molds — a spa-like bench with a storage shelf.

name: Medline Tub Transfer Bench
shortDescription: Our top transfer bench — dual suction-and-rubber feet grip both inside and outside the tub.
features: Suction feet inside + rubber feet outside

name: Medline Padded Bamboo Transfer Bench
shortDescription: A padded bamboo seat and back add comfort for longer, more relaxed bathing.

name: Drive Medical Tub Transfer Bench
shortDescription: The most-reviewed transfer bench (32K+): a simple, dependable sit-and-slide A-frame.

name: Carex Tub Transfer Bench (No-Rust)
shortDescription: No metal to rust or corrode, with a backrest that has two built-in handles.
features: Converts to right or left entry

name: Carex Aluminum Transfer Bench
shortDescription: A lightweight, value-priced bench that disassembles quickly for storage or travel.

name: HOMLAND Transfer Bench (FSA/HSA)
shortDescription: A budget-friendly 400 lb A-frame bench, FSA/HSA eligible, with a reversible backrest.

name: VEVOR Sliding Transfer Bench (Swivel)
shortDescription: A sliding, 360°-swivel seat with a safety belt for the easiest assisted transfers.

name: Gozuna Swivel Transfer Bench (360°)
shortDescription: A padded 360° swivel seat that locks every 90° for safe, controlled tub transfers.

name: Moen Home Care 24" Grab Bar
shortDescription: Our top grab bar: 500 lb stainless steel with concealed screws and a lifetime warranty.

name: Moen Home Care 18" Grab Bar (1.5" Grip)
shortDescription: A larger 1.5" diameter makes this 18" bar easier to wrap a hand around.

name: Moen 12" Peened Grab Bar
shortDescription: A peened, textured finish gives the best grip for wet hands in a compact 12" bar.

name: Moen Designer 16" Grab Bar
shortDescription: Looks like a towel bar, holds like a grab bar — finger notches and a brushed-nickel finish.

name: Moen Designer 24" Curled-Grip Grab Bar
shortDescription: A 24" designer bar with a curled-grip handle and finger notches in brushed nickel.

name: Delta Contemporary 24" Grab Bar
shortDescription: A decorative, corrosion-resistant bar that looks like a designer fixture, ANSI-rated.

name: Lava Odoro Modern Stainless Grab Bar (18")
shortDescription: A sleek modern stainless grab bar that looks like a designer towel bar, not a hospital rail.

name: Amazon Basics 24" Grab Bar
shortDescription: The value pick: 500 lb brushed stainless with thousands of strong reviews.

name: Vive 12" Grab Bar
shortDescription: A compact, water-resistant 12" bar with versatile angled mounting options.

name: Ravinte 16" Grab Bars (2-Pack)
shortDescription: Two knurled-grip stainless bars — the best value when you need more than one.

name: Bemis Snap 2 Secure Raised Toilet Seat
shortDescription: A 1,000 lb bolt-on seat that locks permanently and never wobbles — OT-recommended, made in USA.

name: Lunderg Elevated Toilet Seat with Handles
shortDescription: An elegant bolt-on seat with removable wood-finish handles and a soft-close lid — no hospital look.

name: HOMLAND Freestanding Toilet Safety Frame
shortDescription: A freestanding frame that adds support without modifying the toilet — height and width adjustable.
bestFor: those who can't modify the toilet

name: Medical King Freestanding Raised Toilet Seat
shortDescription: A freestanding unit with an extra-large padded seat that folds for travel.

name: Soundfuse Freestanding Toilet Seat Riser
shortDescription: Six height and width levels plus a waterproof padded seat and handy organizer.

name: Gorilla Grip Non-Slip Bath Mat
shortDescription: The most-reviewed bath mat anywhere (111K+): hundreds of suction cups and proven grip.

name: SlipX Solutions Power Grip Bath Mat
shortDescription: 365 oversized suction cups deliver the strongest grip for maximum security.

name: OTHWAY Bath Mat with Hair Catcher
shortDescription: 604 drain holes (the most here) plus a detachable hair catcher to protect the drain.

name: Homerella Anti-Mold Bath Mat
shortDescription: Antibacterial vinyl plus two drying hooks so the mat never sits in standing water.

name: Hargiis Cut-to-Fit Bath Mat
shortDescription: A loofah-like, fast-drying mat you can trim to fit any tub or shower exactly.

name: OTHWAY TPE Ultra-Grip Bath Mat
shortDescription: Recyclable, odorless TPE that air-dries in about 30 minutes with strong grip.

name: Yimobra Extra-Long Bath Mat
shortDescription: An extra-long 40-inch mat with a pebble-like massage surface and strong suction.

name: AmazerBath Extra-Long Clear Bath Mat
shortDescription: Budget-friendly, extra-long, and clear so it blends into the tub.

name: TEESHLY Domed-Texture Bath Mat
shortDescription: A budget extra-long mat with a domed pebble texture for grip and gentle massage.

name: Bare Decor Giza Teak Shower Mat
shortDescription: Solid teak that never molds or rusts — a beautiful, spa-like mat for shower floors.
features: Solid teak, naturally high oil content

name: Medical Guardian MGMini (Mobile Alert)
shortDescription: A compact under-1.2 oz mobile alert with 24/7 US operators, GPS, and up to 5-day battery.
features: Up to 5-day battery, optional fall detection

name: Ezy Dose Push-Button AM/PM Weekly Pill Organizer
shortDescription: Arthritis Foundation-commended one-handed push-button lids with extra-large compartments.

name: KingPavonini L-Shape Bed Assist Rail
shortDescription: ASTM-certified L-shape assist rail with an ergonomic curved handle and storage pocket.
bestFor: getting in and out of bed

name: BigDolphin Curved Bed Rail (Spinnable Leg)
shortDescription: A spinnable leg bottom self-adjusts to uneven floors, eliminating dangerous gaps.

name: BigDolphin Reinforced Mattress-Grip Bed Rail
shortDescription: Multi-layer non-slip foam grips the mattress, with extra reinforcement bars for stability.

name: Stander EZ Adjust Bed Rail
shortDescription: A full-length guard rail that adjusts 26"–42" and folds flat for bedding changes.

name: YrHeiper Bed Rail with Stabilizing Leg
shortDescription: A stabilizing floor leg plus heavy-duty tie-down straps add extra support.

name: YrHeiper Compact Bed Rail
shortDescription: Slides under the mattress with tie-down straps for dual-point security in a compact size.

name: SEESMILE Stand-Alone Bed Rail
shortDescription: The only rail here compatible with adjustable bed frames — padded handles on both sides.

name: RMS 32" Reacher Grabber (2-Pack)
shortDescription: The most arthritis-friendly grabber: a full-hand trigger and rotating jaw, two to a pack.

name: RMS 34" + 21" Reacher Combo
shortDescription: A long reacher for standing plus a short one for seated use — wheelchair, recliner, or bed.

name: RMS 34" Foldable Reacher
shortDescription: Folds compact for a walker bag or bedside, with a rotating jaw and steel-cable mechanism.

name: RMS Featherweight 32" Reacher (2-Pack)
shortDescription: Ultra-light aluminum ideal for severe arthritis, with a wide claw and magnetic tip.

name: Kekoy 36" Rotating Reacher
shortDescription: A 360° anti-slip rotating jaw reaches awkward angles; folds under 12" with a magnet.

name: Phantawell 2-in-1 Dressing Stick & Shoe Horn
shortDescription: Dress without bending — an adjustable stick with an S-hook for pants, socks, and shirts.

name: RMS Deluxe Sock Aid
shortDescription: Put socks on without bending — a flexible shell built for weak hand strength.

name: AUVON Spring-Open Weekly Pill Organizer
shortDescription: Spring-assisted lids pop open one-handed, with color-coded days and XL compartments.

name: AUVON 180° Easy-Fill AM/PM Pill Organizer
shortDescription: Lids open 180° and stay open on the same side for effortless weekly filling.
pros: Take one day on the go

name: AUVON Moisture-Proof 4x-Daily Pill Organizer
shortDescription: Snap-lock, moisture-proof daily containers keep pills dry and travel-ready.

name: Daviky 7-Day 3x-Daily Pill Organizer
shortDescription: A 21-compartment three-times-daily organizer with bold permanent labels and a protective shell.
pros: Take a day at a time

name: Pillex Locking-Latch Weekly Pill Organizer
shortDescription: A mountaineering-style latch keeps lids from popping open in a bag, with a humidity seal.

name: Lifewit 28-Day Monthly Pill Organizer
shortDescription: A full month of doses in four detachable 7-day boxes with extra-large compartments.
pros: Grab a week at a time

name: Barhon Extra-Large Weekly Pill Organizer
shortDescription: The biggest single-dose compartments here — up to 35 capsules each — with etched labels.

name: AT&T CD4930 Large-Button Corded Phone
shortDescription: A big-button corded phone with a tilt display, audio-assist boost, and answering machine.

name: Clarity P300 Amplified Photo Phone
shortDescription: Amplifies up to 26 dB with high-frequency enhancement and 9 photo-memory buttons.

name: Serene Innovations HD40P Amplified Photo Phone
shortDescription: Nine photo speed-dial buttons make calling intuitive for dementia and memory loss.

name: Panasonic KX-TGM450S Amplified Cordless Phone
shortDescription: A powerful amplified cordless phone with a big backlit display, loud ringer, and slow-talk playback.
features: Photo speed dial + visual flash ringer

name: VTech SN5127 Amplified Cordless Phone
shortDescription: A loud, big-button cordless phone with audio boost, photo dial, and slow message playback.

name: VTech SN5127 + SN5107 Two-Handset Bundle
shortDescription: Two handsets for whole-home coverage, with battery backup during power outages.

name: Geemarc Ampli550 Amplified Phone
shortDescription: Up to 55 dB amplification with talking caller ID and a talking keypad for severe hearing loss.

name: Geemarc AmpliPOWER60 Ultra-Amplified Phone
shortDescription: The loudest phone here: up to 65 dB TrueSound amplification with an extra-bright call strobe.

name: ClearSounds CSC600 UltraClear Amplified Corded Phone
shortDescription: An ultra-clear amplified corded phone with a built-in medical alert button for emergencies.

name: ClearSounds CSC500 Amplified Corded Phone
shortDescription: A loud amplified corded phone with speakerphone for easy, hands-free conversations.

name: CallToU Wireless Caregiver Pager (2+2 Set)
shortDescription: No monthly fee — a wearable call button pages a caregiver in the same home, up to 500 ft.
cons: Does NOT dispatch 911 — alerts a caregiver only
